title: Frontend Development
description: A comprehensive roadmap for mastering modern Frontend Web Development. This path guides you from basic web structures to building highly optimized, type-safe, and production-ready web applications.

phases.title: Phase 1: Web Foundations
phases.description: Master the absolute building blocks of the web: structuring and styling content.

topics.name: HTML
topics.description: HyperText Markup Language (HTML) is the core standard markup language used to structure content on the web.
keyConcepts: Semantic HTML tags (header, footer, nav, article, section)
HTML forms, inputs, and client-side validation
SEO best practices, document metadata, and head configuration
Accessibility (ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, screen reader support)

projects.name: Personal Portfolio Page
projects.description: Build a fully semantic page containing your bio, work experience, list of projects, and a contact form with input validation.

topics.name: CSS
topics.description: Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) is used to control layout, formatting, typography, and visual presentation of HTML documents.
keyConcepts: Box model, specificity, and cascading rules
Modern layouts (Flexbox and CSS Grid)
Responsive Web Design using media queries
Transitions, keyframe animations, and 3D transforms

resources.name: MDN Web Docs - CSS First Steps

projects.name: Responsive Landing Page
projects.description: Design and build a responsive landing page using Grid and Flexbox layouts. The page must adjust seamlessly to desktop, tablet, and mobile views.

phases.title: Phase 2: Programming the Web
phases.description: Bring your websites to life by learning programmatic interactions, asynchronous behaviors, and logic.

topics.name: JavaScript
topics.description: JavaScript is a versatile scripting language that allows you to implement complex features on web pages, from animations to async operations.
keyConcepts: Variables, data types, operators, and control flow
DOM manipulation, events, and bubbling
Asynchronous JavaScript (Promises, async/await, Fetch API)
Modern ES6+ syntax (Destructuring, spread/rest operators, modules)

projects.name: Interactive Dashboard (Weather or Currency)
projects.description: Develop a client-side application that fetches data from a public REST API and dynamically displays it on a card-based grid interface with search and filters.
keyDeliverables: Dynamic DOM updates based on user interaction

phases.title: Phase 3: Utility-First Styling
phases.description: Speed up your CSS development flow by utilizing modern styling tools and frameworks.

topics.name: Tailwind CSS
topics.description: A utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom user interfaces without leaving your HTML.
keyConcepts: Utility-first concept vs. semantic CSS
Responsive utility modifiers (`sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`, `xl:`)
Hover, focus, active, and peer state styling
Theme configuration and customizable spacing, typography, and color tokens

projects.name: Cyberpunk SaaS Landing Page
projects.description: Recreate a stunning SaaS landing page with dark mode, glowing gradients, hover-zoom effects, and fluid grids completely using Tailwind utility classes.
keyDeliverables: Consistent color palette matching modern HSL design
Complex grid and card hover states

phases.title: Phase 4: Type-Safe Development
phases.description: Build highly scalable and robust applications by adding static typing to your JavaScript.

topics.name: TypeScript
topics.description: TypeScript is a strongly-typed programming language that builds on JavaScript, giving you better tooling and fewer runtime bugs.
keyConcepts: Primitive types, type assertions, and type inference
Interfaces, Types, and Union/Intersection types
Generics, utility types, and structural typing
Strict mode configuration and integration with build tools

projects.name: Type-Safe Task Manager CLI/Web App
projects.description: Develop a state-driven task tracker where tasks are fully structured with strict interfaces and enums for categories/status.

phases.title: Phase 5: Dynamic UI Libraries
phases.description: Learn to manage user interfaces using component-driven frameworks and declarative state.

topics.name: React
topics.description: React is an extremely popular component-based JavaScript library for building interactive user interfaces.
keyConcepts: JSX syntax, Virtual DOM, and component rendering cycles
State management using hooks (`useState`, `useReducer`)
Handling side effects (`useEffect`, `useLayoutEffect`)
Performance optimization (`useMemo`, `useCallback`, `React.memo`)

resources.name: Epic React by Kent C. Dodds

projects.name: Interactive Shopping Cart Dashboard
projects.description: Build a React shopping dashboard with filters, search, a sliding shopping cart modal, and local storage state persistence.
keyDeliverables: Reusable modal and cart card components

phases.title: Phase 6: Production Frameworks
phases.description: Assemble and deploy high-performance applications with Server Side Rendering, routing, and APIs.

topics.name: Next.js
topics.description: Next.js is a powerful React framework that enables developers to build high-performance production applications with server-side features.
keyConcepts: App Router and file-system based routing structure
Server Components vs. Client Components
Data fetching patterns (Server actions, ISR, SSR, SSG)
Next.js optimization features (Images, fonts, script handling, SEO metadata)

projects.name: Interactive Roadmap Hub
projects.description: Implement a fully dynamic version of the Demon Tech Roadmap using Next.js App Router, loading tracks from static JSON files, showing dynamic progress, and rendering interactive nodes.
keyDeliverables: Clean folder-structure under Next.js App Router
Static path pre-rendering for optimal performance
Highly optimized Next.js Images and Font modules
